headline: Trump Says Iran Has Asked for a Cease-Fire. Oil Prices Are Falling.
summary: Oil prices were sliding on Wednesday after President Donald Trump said that Iran’s President had asked for a cease-fire, boosting investors’ hopes that the war in the Middle East could soon end.  Brent  crude international futures were down 1.8% at $102.06 a barrel in early trading, after falling below the $100 a barrel level earlier in the day for the first time since Friday.  West Texas Intermediate  U.S. futures were down 1.2% at $100.25 a barrel.

headline: Oil Drops Below $100 a Barrel Ahead of Trump Addressing the Nation About Iran War
summary: Oil prices were dropping on Wednesday after President Donald Trump gave investors hope that the war in the Middle East could soon end.  Brent  international futures slid 4.3% to $99.63 a barrel in early trading, falling below the $100 a barrel level for the first time since Friday.  West Texas Intermediate  U.S. futures were 4.6% lower at $96.77 a barrel.
